items.title: Block launches Buzz — open-source Nostr workspace where agents are peers
items.bd_actionability: First open-source workspace designed for human-agent collaboration without a proprietary platform. Self-hostable under Apache 2.0, model-agnostic (Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Goose). Cryptographic audit trail of agent actions via Nostr keypairs.
key_claims: Version: v0.4.21 — block.xyz primary
License: Apache 2.0 — block.xyz primary
Internally deployed at Block as Slack + GitHub replacement — block.xyz primary
Agent keypairs tied to human owner via second signature — block.xyz primary
caveats: v0.4.21 is early-stage software; positioned as intentional open release, not a polished commercial product

items.title: MCP 2026-07-28 final specification ships July 28 — stateless core eliminates session management
items.bd_actionability: Stateless architecture removes the primary operational barrier to running MCP servers at production scale. Teams running MCP in production or evaluating it should plan migration against SDK betas now available. Breaking changes confirmed for all current MCP server and client implementations.

sources.org: Model Context Protocol Blog (David Soria Parra & Den Delimarsky)

key_claims: Session state eliminated: every request now self-contained via _meta — MCP blog primary
SDK betas: Python v2, TypeScript v2, Go v1.7.0-pre.1, C# 2.0.0-preview.1 — MCP blog primary
Final spec date: 2026-07-28 — MCP blog primary
Validation window: ten weeks post-launch — MCP blog primary
Extensions framework: Tasks primitive graduates with tasks/get, tasks/update, tasks/cancel
caveats: RC published May 2026; final spec ships July 28
SDK betas not production-ready; ten-week validation window explicitly for stabilization
Breaking changes confirmed for all current MCP implementations

items.title: OpenAI launches Presence enterprise agent platform in limited GA
items.bd_actionability: First OpenAI managed agent-deployment product with governance built in. No self-serve API — requires OpenAI Forward Deployed Engineers or approved global systems integrators. Currently a premium offering for large enterprises; no self-serve pilot path.

sources.note: HTTP 403 from this environment; content verified via four independent outlets
Critiques lack of self-serve path and opaque pricing

key_claims: Early deployment resolved 75% of inbound developer support without human assistance — OpenAI via VentureBeat
Deployment requires OpenAI FDEs or approved SIs — VentureBeat, The Register
Pricing: not disclosed — The Register
Availability: limited GA — Help Net Security
Built on GPT-5.6 and Codex
caveats: openai.com URL returned HTTP 403; verified via four independent outlets

items.title: ChatGPT Health reaches all US users across all plans
items.bd_actionability: Health data integration in a general-purpose AI assistant available to free-tier users. For enterprise wellness programs or consumer applications building on ChatGPT, connected health context expands conversational AI use. Feature is advisory only — not for diagnosis or treatment.

sources.note: OpenAI primary URL returned HTTP 403; TechCrunch is primary verified source

key_claims: Available to all US users 18+ across all plans as of 23 Jul 2026 — TechCrunch
Integrations: Apple Health, MyFitnessPal, Epic, Oracle Health — TechCrunch
Health context flows into all conversations, not only health-specific queries — TechCrunch
Not intended for diagnosis or treatment — OpenAI via TechCrunch
Available on web and iOS; Android not announced
caveats: OpenAI primary URL returned HTTP 403; verified via TechCrunch
Previously in limited testing since January 2026
Android support not announced at launch

items.title: White House OSTP director accuses Moonshot AI of distilling Anthropic's Fable 5
items.bd_actionability: If sanctions or export controls are imposed on Moonshot AI, Kimi K3 commercial API and open-weight access could be restricted for US-jurisdictional teams. Evaluate Kimi K3 production commitment risk before July 27 weight release and independent architectural analysis.

sources.note: Notes absence of public technical evidence supporting the distillation claim

key_claims: Fable 5 public availability restored: 1 Jul 2026 — TechCrunch via OSTP statement
Kimi K3 launch: 16 Jul 2026 — prior coverage
15-day distillation window cited by OSTP — TechCrunch
Treasury: sanctions and blacklisting under consideration — TechCrunch
Expert skepticism on timeline: Elie Bakouch, Prime Intellect — TechCrunch
caveats: Distillation claim originates from government official statement, not technical analysis
No independent evidence of architectural similarity published
Expert skepticism on 15-day timeline feasibility reported
Moonshot AI has not confirmed; Anthropic has not publicly commented
Open weights release July 27 will enable independent architectural analysis
